---
title: "About this Portfolio"
# use quarto markdown to 
---

This portfolio is a representation of academic final projects, research, personal and professional projects and analysis demonstrating skills learned during my time studying economics, mathematics, and data science. 

It explores topics in: 

  - Student Housing Analysis of Occupancy, Pricing, Bed Count, and Survey Data 
  - Brad Hall Fuel Supply Chain Analysis 
  - Horse Racing Traditional and GPS Data Analysis
  - Kruskal Wallace (Non-parametric anova test): Electricity Generation Capacity by     production type
  - Child Tax Credit and Juvenile Delinquency Relationship
